name: @radzor/search-index
description: Full-text search with facets, filters, and typo-tolerance. Supports Meilisearch and Typesense. Handles indexing, real-time updates, relevance tuning, and instant search queries.

inputs.name: indexName
inputs.description: Index / collection name to operate on.

inputs.name: searchableFields
inputs.description: Fields to index for full-text search.

inputs.name: filterableFields
inputs.description: Fields available for filtering and faceting.

inputs.name: primaryKey
inputs.description: Field used as the document unique identifier.

outputs.name: searchResults
outputs.description: Search response with hits, total, processing time, and facet counts.

events.name: onIndexed
events.description: Fired when documents are successfully indexed.

events.name: onSearchComplete
events.description: Fired when a search query returns.

events.name: onError
events.description: Fired when an indexing or search operation fails.

actions.name: index
actions.description: Add or replace documents in the index.

actions.name: search
actions.description: Perform a full-text search with optional filtering and faceting.

actions.name: update

params.name: documents
params.description: Partial documents to merge into existing ones.

actions.description: Partially update existing documents (merge, not replace).

actions.name: clearIndex
actions.description: Delete all documents in the index without deleting the index settings.

actions.name: configure
actions.description: Update index settings (searchable fields, ranking, etc.).

connectsTo.description: Feed search results to LLM or export them.

llm.constraints: Requires a running Meilisearch or Typesense instance — not a managed SaaS. Indexing is async in Meilisearch (tasks complete in background). Always set searchableFields and filterableFields before indexing data to avoid full re-indexing.
